summary: Reviewed the supplied review pack for the playlist-first workflow, but the pack contains no spec document, changed files, diff, or related file contents. The main risk is false confidence: the requested completeness and feasibility review cannot be performed from the provided evidence, especially for intro song URL inputs. Overall assessment: the pack is insufficient for a merge-blocking spec review until the actual workflow spec and relevant current-code excerpts are included.
appears_sound: The pack includes the relevant project constraints and architecture summary, including Supabase live sessions, localStorage sync, Spotify OAuth, PDF generation, and the required verification commands in `Project Conventions (CLAUDE.md)`.
The pack explicitly states there is no implementation diff, which avoids implying that production code changed when `Changed Files` and `Diff` are empty.

findings.description: The requested review asks whether the two-phase playlist-first workflow spec is complete, correct, and feasible, but the pack contains no actual workflow spec or changed files. Any approval would be based on assumption rather than evidence.
findings.evidence: The pack shows `Changed Files _(none detected for this diff range)_`, `Diff _(no diff output)_`, `Changed File Contents _(no files to include)_`, and no related files.
findings.why_it_might_be_wrong: The spec may exist outside the diff or was omitted from the generated review pack.
findings.what_would_confirm: Include the workflow spec document and the relevant existing route/component/API files that the spec depends on.

findings.description: Intro song URL inputs are explicitly called out by the user, but the pack contains no requirements for accepted URL formats, validation behavior, storage, sync, or error handling. This leaves user-reachable behavior undefined for invalid URLs, Spotify URLs, preview URLs, empty values, duplicates, and unavailable tracks.
findings.evidence: The only mention is the user concern, `Are intro song URL inputs properly specified?`, while the pack has no spec or file contents defining those inputs.
findings.why_it_might_be_wrong: The omitted spec may already define these cases clearly.
findings.what_would_confirm: Provide the intro song URL input section of the spec and any current form/API validation code it is intended to modify.

empty_categories: No implementation correctness defects can be confirmed because the diff and changed file contents are empty.
No security, data-integrity, performance, or repository-convention regressions can be confirmed from this pack because there is no code change to inspect.
